## 2.1.0 — 2026-06-30

### Added
- **PR Walkthrough** — high-level summary comment with risk assessment and file changes by area (`review -o walkthrough`)
- **Incremental re-review** — `--incremental` flag reviews only files changed since the last review
- **Custom rules engine** — project-specific regex rules in `.signal-lens.yml` (`rules.custom`)
- **Injection analyzer** — SQL injection, path traversal, command injection, unsafe deserialization
- **Multi-language symbol support** — Rust (`.rs`) and Java (`.java`) indexed
- **`signal-lens init`** — scaffolds `.signal-lens.yml` with inline documentation
- **`signal-lens config`** — prints resolved configuration for debugging
- **Auto-detect base branch** — `review` without `--base` detects `main`/`master`
- **JSON Schema** — `docs/signal-lens.schema.json` for IDE autocomplete
- **SARIF upload step** — `upload-sarif` input in GitHub Action

### Fixed
- Stable finding IDs (deterministic hash instead of array index)
- AI provider error visibility (HTTP 401/429/500 surfaced in metadata)
- Anthropic model selection (`ai.model` now honored)
- `Promise.allSettled` (one analyzer failure no longer aborts review)
- zod config validation with descriptive errors
- Global error handler with friendly CLI messages

### Changed
- Version sourced from `package.json` via `src/core/version.ts`
- Symbol extraction unified in `src/core/diff-symbols.ts`
- Anthropic `max_tokens` increased to 4096
